categories.name: Things you might find rattling in a kitchen drawer
Hidden types of protective roles (word contains it)

decoys.category_a: Things you might find rattling in a kitchen drawer
decoys.reason_a: Coins are a classic kitchen drawer rattle
decoys.reason_b: Coins can be spun, tempting a solver here.

decoys.category_b: Hidden types of protective roles (word contains it)
decoys.reason_a: WRITER can refer to a spinning writer in a metaphorical sense (plot spins), and is a spinning mechanism part in some devices
decoys.reason_b: WRITER contains 'rite' (as in tradition/protection) and also is a literal member here. The duality is a cross-pull.
